__prompts__.project_description: One-line description used in pyproject.toml, package.json, README.
__prompts__.python_package_name: Importable Python package name (underscores, no dashes).
__prompts__.author_email: Author email; baseline for the security disclosure address.
__prompts__.year: Year used in LICENSE and copyright headers.

license.__prompt__: License shipped with the rendered project.
license.Apache-2.0: permissive license with explicit patent grant

primary_language.__prompt__: Primary language path. Drives which build files survive post-render pruning.
primary_language.polyglot: Both — keep Python and TypeScript build glue side by side

python_typechecker.__prompt__: Python type-checker. Astral `ty` is the 2026 default; `mypy` is the opt-in fallback.
python_typechecker.mypy: mypy (mature, ships scientific-deps overrides commented out)

include_codacy.yes: include — adds .codacy.yml and the codacy CI job

include_codecov.__prompt__: Add `codecov.yaml` plus a CI upload job.
include_codecov.yes: include — adds codecov.yaml and the coverage upload job

include_snyk.yes: include — adds .snyk and the snyk CI job

include_macaron.__prompt__: Add an Oracle Macaron supply-chain analysis job to supply-chain.yml.
include_macaron.no: skip — supply-chain.yml without the Macaron job
include_macaron.yes: include — Macaron analysis runs on pull requests and pushes

include_devcontainer.no: skip — bring your own dev environment

include_docs_site.__prompt__: Add `mkdocs.yml` (Material) and a `docs.yml` workflow that deploys to GitHub Pages.
include_docs_site.no: skip — docs/ stays as plain markdown
include_docs_site.yes: include — MkDocs Material site auto-published from the default branch

include_release_automation.__prompt__: Add Commitizen helper plus release-please workflow/config for automated Release PRs and tags.
include_release_automation.yes: include — .cz.toml, release-please config, and release workflow

include_promptfoo.__prompt__: Add prompts/ + evals/ directories and a `make eval` gate via promptfoo.
include_promptfoo.yes: include — prompts/, evals/promptfooconfig.yaml, make eval target

__prompts__.default_branch_name: Protected branch the runtime hook guards.
